notes: Added 'import Link from next/link'. When allTools.length === 0, Assigned Tools section now shows 'No tools defined yet.' with a Next.js Link to /w/{workspaceId}/tools styled with text-[var(--accent-blue)] hover:underline. When allTools.length > 0, existing dropdown behavior is unchanged. Removed the now-unreachable 'No tools — create tools first' DropdownMenuLabel (dropdown only renders when allTools.length > 0).
